sharedPost.text:
Looking for people interested in a creative portrait collaboration in Barcelona.

The project focuses on natural, confident portraits in outdoor locations with a clean, aesthetic feel. No professional experience is needed, but you should feel comfortable in front of the camera.

A model release is required, and images may be used for portfolio and commercial use.

You’ll get a guided photoshoot and selected images from your session.

**Requirements:**

• Bring 5 outfit options

• Be comfortable signing a model release

If interested, send me a message here or on Instagram:

instagram.com/insta_grammable_experience

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**serial fabularny – EPIZODY KOBIECE**

Na wiosnę ruszamy z nowym serialem fabularnym, a do którego teraz szukamy **KOBIET 18+ jako DZIEWCZYN ULTRASÓW**.

Szukam dziewczyn wyróżniających się, typ dziewczyny z blokowiska. Warkoczyki, kolorowe włosy, krótkie włosy, kolczyki, piercing, dziary itp.

Stawki ustalane indywidualnie. Wybory należą do reżysera.

**Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć aktualną wizytówkę jako link do You Tube**

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **DUK**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost

W załączniku: aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.title: EMERGENCY CASTING CALL!!

items.text:
CASTING ACTORS FOR FIGHT SCENE IN FEATURE FILM!!

Title: Saturdays

Genre: Thriller/Comedy

Logline: After accidentally taking a new designer drug on the way to a Halloween party, three broke nobodies become viral vigilantes in a city on the edge but their rise to infamy puts them in the cross-hairs of a charismatic cartel leader.

Role:

Carlos (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Hugo (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Knuckles (20-40) Drug packer

Diesel (20-40) Drug packer

Brick (20-40) Drug packer

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Loste Films

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Catering/Crafty provided during proof of concept shoot. Compensation for future shoot dates is open to negotiation.

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume and reel. Stunt experience preferred.

Shooting Schedule: March 28-29th. 11am call time both days.

Filming Location: Denver

Project Description: Saturdays is an upcoming feature film we’re currently shooting the beginning of to use as a proof of concept. The scenes in the proof of concept are still being used in the final movie, which will be shot later on in the year. We’re ideally looking for actors with stunt experience.

IMDB Link: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/)

topComments.text: These dates correct?
Interested

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – INDIE NO-BUDGET FILM** 🎬

Hi everyone! I’m looking to cast a **female actor** for a small but important role in an indie short film.

🎭 **Role:** Day Care Teacher
* Female
* Age: 30–40
* Warm, natural, and expressive presence

📍 **Location:** Surrey
📅 **Date:** 4th April
⏱️ **Duration:** Approx. 2 hours shoot

🎥 **Details:**
* Volunteer / non-paid position
* Light, manageable shoot with a small crew

✨ **What you’ll get:**
* IMDb credit
* Crafty (food & refreshments on set)
* Opportunity to be part of a passion-driven indie project

If you’re interested or know someone who fits the role, please send your **headshot and a link to any previous work** on **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Thank you! 🙏

items.title:
STAY TUNE GUYS….!

Rahat Shah,
A talented Fitness Model/Actor/Photographer and British Champion in Men’s Physique from Birmingham, UK! 

Hailing from a renowned art family in Pakistan’s film industry, Rahat’s creative genes are undeniable. With a string of achievements, including winning the British Champion award and Asians Beauty Pageant, Rahat has made a name for himself.

His upcoming Indian thriller film “Second Chance” Directed by Sachin Karande is set to release soon, promising to captivate audiences worldwide.

As a cover model for numerous magazines, Rahat’s charm and physique have won hearts. Through his journey, he aims to inspire others, proving that hard work and dedication can lead to success. Stay tuned for an exciting story of passion, talent, and triumph!

items.text:
Ingredienser
2,4 dl kål (grøn eller spidskål), finthakket
1 mellemstor gulerod, julienne- eller grofthøvlet
1 stort grønt æble (som Granny Smith), julienne-thakket
1 mellemstor agurk, julienne-thakket (kerner fjernet, hvis de er for vandede)
1/4 lille rødløg, meget tyndt skåret i halvmåner
Dressingen (smagfuld vinaigrette):
3 spsk ekstra jomfruolivenolie
2 spsk æblecidereddike (eller citronsaft)
1 tsk honning- eller ahornsirup
1/2 tsk dijonsennep (valgfrit, til emulgering)
Salt og sort peber efter smag
Jeg sendte den til alle, der kommenterede "Hej"
OPSKRIFT I FØRSTE KOMMENTAR

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

items.text:
I lived in London for 10 years, moving from Manchester to pursue acting more seriously.
I worked as an extra to gain on set experience and earn a decent wage.
I had private tuition, attended workshops, masterclasses, and some drama school.
I felt competent as an actor.
I was putting everything in to it.
Yet I struggled with the systems within the industry, often finding myself disagreeing and trying to create a bespoke path for myself instead.
You can't.
Learn to accept that.
Your journey will be easier and more productive. 
Play the game enough to utilise it for your own base ends.
Impress people that matter.
Connect with those that elevate.
Learn from other actors.
Don't be so hard on yourself or others.
And most of all, become an approachable, considerate, and unimposing professional.
You will find way more positivity in your journey and it will continue to grow as does your progression now.
Don't fight the industry, adapt to keep your power.
#acting #actor #actorslife #positive #progress

sharedPost.text:
💥 ENROLMENTS for the 2026/2027 academic year officially open❗️ 
:
👉 Master of Arts in Theatre at Accademia Dimitri 

In a rich and challenging environment, the Master of Arts in Theatre at Accademia Dimitri is designed as a space for performance and artistic experimentation.​
 
The program offers a wide range of approaches to theater and performance through the body and its expression. It is aimed at graduates of theatre- and art-related degree programs and established artists who wish to enrich their skills, experiences and methodologies by developing new connections within their practice.​​
 
The training initially provides common instruction for all students, and then diversifies into three different focuses:

▪️Physical Theatre
▪️Figure Theatre (material, object, and puppet theater)
▪️Applied Theatre Practice

✨ Shape Your path in physical theatre! 

👉 Apply now!
❓More info: https://www.accademiadimitri.ch/en/master

#accademiadimitri #supsi

HOT SEASON 2026: FREESTYLE DANCERS WANTED IN TURKEY! 🔥💃🕺

Are you ready to spend your summer performing at the best parties under the Mediterranean sun? We are looking for charismatic, high-energy Freestyle Dancers to join our elite entertainment teams!

🚀 APPLY & REGISTER NOW: https://risingstars-talents.com/dance-jobs-abroad/?utm_source=reg-FB-kbshkn

items.text:
Har du god energi på kamera og elsker shopping, hverdagsinspiration og formidling? 📸 Så er det måske dig, vi leder efter som vært til City 2’s sociale medier.

Vi søger 1 vært, der har lyst til at være ansigtet udadtil på City 2’s kanaler og formidle content på en naturlig og imødekommende måde. Vi står for optagelse, redigering og alt det praktiske – du skal blot være ansigtet udadtil og får et færdigt script med det, der skal siges.

Om rollen:
• Medvirken i månedligt content til TikTok, Instagram og Facebook.
• Frekvens: Optages én gang om måneden.
• Optagelser foregår i City 2 Shoppingcenter.
• Tidsrum: kl. 13–16.
• Content bruges både organisk og til paid annoncering. Organisk annoncering er gratis opslag, der vises naturligt til følgere og andre brugere. Paid annoncering er opslag, man betaler for, så de vises til flere og udvalgte målgrupper.
• Script sendes på forhånd, så der er god tid til forberedelse.

Vi leder efter dig, der:
• Har god energi og er naturlig på kamera.
• Har en imødekommende og troværdig udstråling.
• Er tryg ved at tale til kamera og skabe nærvær.
• Er fleksibel og kan indgå i en løbende content-plan.
• Har erfaring fra lignende opgaver (bare en bonus)

Praktisk info.:
• Løn på dagsbasis

Sådan søger du:
• Send mig en kort video (30–60 sek.), hvor du formidler et valgfrit budskab til kamera – fx om noget, du holder af, dig selv eller en hverdagsoplevelse. MAIL: Simone@beyond11.dk.

👉 Går du med en vært gemt i maven 
– eller kender du én, der kunne være et godt match? Så hører vi meget gerne fra dig.

items.text:
🌿✨ **STATISTER SØGES – MØDRE MED BARN** ✨🌿

Vil du og dit barn være med i en hyggelig optagelse i smukke, naturlige omgivelser? 🎬💚

Vi søger **mødre med barn** til at agere statister i en havescene. Det bliver en rolig og hyggelig dag med fokus på nærvær og naturlige øjeblikke 🌸

👩‍👧 **Hvem søger vi?**

* Mødre med barn/børn på maks 10 år.

* Jer der har lyst til at være foran kamera i uformelle rammer

* Ingen erfaring nødvendig

📍 Juulsøgaarden: Lavenvej 22, 8600 Skanderborg.

⏰ lørdag og søndag (4 og 5 april)

💰 Jobbet er ulønnet - I vil dog være garanteret en sjov og hyggelig dag, samt jeres navn på rollelisten🙌

Lyder det som noget for jer? 💫

Eller vil du bare høre lidt mere?…

..Send en mail til darchyproductions@gmail.com eller send en direkte besked til mig – vi glæder os til at høre fra jer!

Del meget gerne opslaget 🙏

Hi everyone!

I’m Diego, I work in production for [Violin_Phonix](https://www.facebook.com/groups/173440156082726/user/100094315547612/?__cft__[0]=AZaBJTbbbWZQpGQW8nkJcfGZjrkG7JDl29b73D_iqj4bemIoNImfFT9HfxmBYCM15d-gBA_yH8Rd7WzyNA60PbikqsL6R_JKsHwnN9bEdqHHzQEVgPQtXHQbN_gd4vCqWdhzam3zhqDKRuwnv7aic760&__tn__=-]K-R). We’re currently looking for **2 actors based in London** for an upcoming shoot next Tuesday, 31st of March.

Theme: *Harry Potter*

If you’re interested, feel free to DM me and I’ll share all the details (location,time,fee) privately.

Cheers !

topComments.text: Are you looking for male or female actors??
Hi Diego, have DM’d you. Thank you Michael

items.text:
🚨🚨CAST CALL OUT🚨🚨
Hello!!

We are film students producing a short film for UNSW. This film takes place in a whimsical, vintage, almost steampunk, baby doll universe, with highly stylised costuming and makeup. Think Melanie Martniez, creepy-cute tumblr, circus. This work is on a volunteer basis, but catering will be provided as well as transport.

Shooting dates are still TBC but will most likely be: 

6th of April 

The exact filming locations are TBC, around Sydney. 

Attached are photos for the overall style of the short, as well as the style inspiration for our character. We are looking for our protagonist’s ex boyfriend:  

(18-25) Male

If you are interested contact us at emilia.pejakovic@gmail.com with a headshot and we can continue from there.

🎬 IMPROV AUDITION / LIVE SHOOT – MONDAY, MARCH 30 🎬
This is not just practice — this is a real filmed audition experience. We’re casting and shooting live, with select scenes being saved for major network productions and big screen opportunities.

🔥 DETAILS:

📍 Town of Trilith South Atlanta Artists Alley @ RJ Props

Monday, March 30

⏰ 4:00 PM – 9:00 PM

🎭 Actors • Creators • Comedians welcome!

Come ready to improvise, perform, and bring real energy on camera. This is your chance to step into a real set environment and get seen.

🚨 Spots are limited — DM now to secure your place.

Email honestearthsolutions@gmail.com

Questions, call 404-210-9029

#Improv #CastingCall #AtlantaActors #Audition #FilmShoot #ActorsLife #OnSet #NetworkOpportunity

Hi everyone,

We’re still casting for my short student film, it is being filmed on the 8,9,10th of April in the Cotswolds Playhouse.

Please contact liamgarrattfilm@gmail.com if you are willing to play either role of Cameron or Rosie as that is who we need!

Thank you!

Emergency casting call ‼️
Hi all, I am posting an extras casting call for ‘Confessional’ a short film I am producing. 

This is a Dark comedy and a drama. It is also a short film of 8 minutes. Filming will take place in Cheltenham on 2nd of April. Not a paid role but food will be provided.

If you are interested please email me at emmamgfilm@gmail.com and or send me a message through here 🙏 please list availability in email

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '호 Confessional Casting Catt Extra role needed! 2nd T April Filming in Cheltenham 2nd April flawed man, estranged fromh his family, attends his mother's funeraloutof bligation. After turning up thewrong church and mistaken for priest outinto hearinga series confessions. woman's drastically changes his ofhis relationship with fhisrelationshipwithhis his mother. woman woman1- 1- wanted Age: 20-60 please contact- emmamgf emmamgfilm@gmail.com film@ ifinterested and list avaliabilty Roles are unapid but food will be provided'

✨ JETZT BUCHEN – DAS HIGHLIGHT FÜR IHRE VERANSTALTUNG! ✨

💃🏼 Mitreißende Party- und Tanz-Show 🕺mit:

🎤 Sänger • Entertainer • Moderator ➡️ Mathias Marie - Die Kaiserin und auf Wunsch mit DJ Roland - geballte Kompetenz in der Live- Unterhaltung 

– ein Highlight für jede Veranstaltung!

🎶 Musikmix:
80er • 90er • Schlager • Pop • Aktuelle Hits & Oldies

STIMME • HERZ • SHOW – beste Stimmung garantiert!
